import io
import string

type Color =
  | Red
  | Green
  | Yellow

fn advance(_ c: Color) -> Color
  match c
  when Red
    Color.Green
  when Green
    Color.Yellow
  when Yellow
    Color.Red
  end
end

fn name(_ c: Color) -> String
  match c
  when Red
    "Red"
  when Green
    "Green"
  when Yellow
    "Yellow"
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  mut state = Color.Red
  mut token = ""
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(line)
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      if token == "next"
        state = advance(state)
      end
      token = ""
    else
      token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if token == "next"
    state = advance(state)
  end

  println(name(state))
end
